zh.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence是Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence的兒子，於大約1014年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯。他於1040年1月與Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1062年在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence是Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence的儿子，于大约1014年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯。他于1040年1月与Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1062年在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Province   1, a cognate of 3 below. This surname is very rare in Britain.
Probably also an altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provance   1.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Province   3 and also 1 above.

variants.name: Province
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Provence   1 and   Provins   1.
Altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provins   2.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence was born about 1014, in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France as the son of Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. He married Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence in January 1040. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1062, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence est né environ 1014, à Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, fils de Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. Il a épousé Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence en janvier 1040. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1062, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence wurde um 1014 in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich, als Sohn von Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence geboren. Er hat im Januar 1040 Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1062 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence è nato il circa 1014 nel Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia come figlio di Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. Lui sposato Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence nel gennaio 1040. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1062, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provenceは約1014年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンアルレスでGerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provenceの息子として生まれた。1040年1月にÉtiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1062年に故郷で50歳で死去し，フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンアルレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence(은)는 대략 1014년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 알레스에서 Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1040년 1월 Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1062년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 알레스에 묻혔다.

mg.um 1014–um 1062: tany ho any amin'ny 1014–tany ho any amin'ny 1062

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence nasceu aproximadamente 1014, em Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França filho de Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. Ele casou-se com Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence em janeiro de 1040. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1062, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence родился около 1014 г. в местности арльс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. Его мать звали Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. Он женился на женщине по имени Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence январь 1040 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1062 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности арльс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

sm.um 1014–um 1062: e tusa o le 1014–e tusa o le 1062

es.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Ier de Provence nació aproximadamente 1014, en Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia como hijo de Gerberge de Bourgogne de Macon, Comtesse consort de Provence. Se casó con Étiennette de Marseille comtesse de Provence en enero de 1040. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1062, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
